cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site.

scope.sphincs-verify: The L1 Vault currently runs the `_verifySimplified` identity gate rather than the full FIPS 205 SPHINCS+ on-chain verification. Phase 2 switches to full verification.
scope.ai-prover: Prover signing decisions are made by the AI Prover Agent (Claude). Cryptography is real FIPS 205 SLH-DSA, but *when* to sign is decided by an LLM. Phase 2 replaces this with HSM-bound human operators or deterministic rule-based automation.
scope.vrf-fallback: When the VRF contract is not configured, Prover selection falls back to block.prevrandao. Production will use Chainlink VRF v2.5 exclusively.
scope.bond-calc-only: The emergency unlock bond is currently only calculated and displayed; no ETH is collected on-chain. Phase 2 wires the full bond collection + slashing flow.
